testcase.name: testCreateOrder_success
testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\ayand\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.14.13\byte-buddy-agent-1.14.13.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: testCreateOrder_duplicateIdempotencyKey_returnsCached
testcase.system-out: 20:06:27.040 [main] WARN com.platform.order.service.OrderService -- Idempotency hit (Redis) for key: 0e30e609-c6ee-4ce2-9a7b-0157cfff71fe 20:06:27.040 [main] INFO com.platform.order.service.OrderService -- Order created: orderId=1be9d9bf-6d99-4228-84a6-7f5ca780eba4
